info.description: This is the backend API for QuokkaQ, rewritten in Go.
info.title: QuokkaQ Go Backend API

post.description: Sends a password reset link to the user's email
Authenticates a user and returns a JWT token

get.description: Returns the currently authenticated user's information

post.description: Resets the user's password using a valid token
Register a new user and organization with trial subscription
Creates a new booking for a service in a unit

get.description: Retrieves a specific booking by its ID

delete.description: Deletes a booking by its ID

post.description: Marks onboarding as complete for the user's company

get.description: Returns current resource usage and limits for the company

post.description: Creates a new counter for a unit

get.description: Retrieves a specific counter by its ID

delete.description: Deletes a counter by its ID

post.description: Calls the next waiting ticket for the counter

404.description: Counter not found or no tickets

post.description: Force releases a counter (supervisor)
Sets a counter as occupied by the current user
Releases a counter

get.description: Retrieves all invitations

post.description: Creates a new invitation for a user with optional pre-assigned units and roles
Registers a new user using an invitation token
post.summary: Register a new user via invitation

get.description: Retrieves an invitation by its token

delete.description: Deletes an invitation by its ID

patch.description: Resends an active invitation by its ID

get.description: Returns invoices for the authenticated user's company

Currently returns HTTP 501 with JSON after authorization. When PDF export is implemented, a successful response will be 200 with body as application/pdf (binary PDF bytes). Until then, clients should treat 501 and handlers.InvoicePDFNotImplementedResponse as the expected outcome.

200.description: Invoice PDF binary (Content-Type: application/pdf) once generation is implemented

post.description: Creates a new service for a unit

get.description: Retrieves a specific service by its ID

delete.description: Deletes a service by its ID

get.description: Returns all active subscription plans

post.description: Creates a checkout session for subscription upgrade

400.description: Bad Request (e.g. missing public APP_BASE_URL for real checkout)

get.description: Returns subscription for the authenticated user's company

post.description: Cancels the subscription at the end of billing period
Creates the first administrator if the system is not initialized

get.description: Checks if the system is initialized (has users)
Retrieves all message templates

post.description: Creates a new message template

get.description: Retrieves a specific template by its ID

delete.description: Deletes a template by its ID

get.description: Retrieves a ticket by its ID

post.description: Picks a specific ticket for a counter
Recalls a ticket
Returns a ticket to the waiting queue

patch.description: Updates the status of a ticket

post.description: Transfers a ticket to another counter or user

get.description: Retrieves a list of all units

post.description: Creates a new unit

get.description: Retrieves a specific unit by its ID

delete.description: Deletes a unit by its ID

patch.description: Updates ad settings for a unit

get.description: Retrieves all bookings for a specific unit

post.description: Calls the next waiting ticket for a unit

get.description: Retrieves all counters for a specific unit
Retrieves materials for a unit

post.description: Adds a material to a unit

get.description: Returns all pre-registrations associated with the unit (authenticated unit member).

post.description: Creates a new pre-registration for the unit; unitId is taken from the path.
Validates the code, creates a ticket, and marks the pre-registration redeemed. Invalid codes return HTTP 200 with success=false and a message; server errors use 5xx.

get.description: Returns HH:MM slot strings for a service on a given date, accounting for capacity and existing bookings.
get.summary: Get available time slots for pre-registration

post.description: Looks up a pre-registration by code for the unit context; returns the record when valid.

put.description: Updates editable fields on an existing pre-registration for the unit.

get.description: Retrieves all services for a specific unit
Retrieves counters for shift view
Retrieves dashboard statistics for a unit

post.description: Performs end of day operations for a unit

get.description: Retrieves current queue tickets for a unit
Returns per-day, per-service capacity definitions used when generating slots.
get.summary: Get weekly slot capacities for a unit

put.description: Updates all weekly capacity rows for the unit; unitId on each item is set from the path.
put.summary: Replace weekly slot capacities for a unit

get.description: Returns weekly slot window settings (start/end time, interval, active days). If none exist, returns defaults scoped to the unit.
get.summary: Get slot configuration for a unit

put.description: Creates or updates weekly slot window settings for the unit.
put.summary: Update slot configuration for a unit

get.description: Returns the day schedule with per-slot booking counts. Responds 404 if slots have not been generated for that date.
get.summary: Get generated slots for a calendar day

put.description: Sets day-off flag and replaces service slots for the given date after validation.

post.description: Materializes slots for the unit between the given dates based on config and capacities.
post.summary: Generate service slots for a date range

get.description: Retrieves all tickets for a specific unit

post.description: Creates a new ticket for a service in a unit

get.description: Returns current resource usage and limits for the authenticated user's company
Retrieves a list of all users

post.description: Creates a new user with the provided details

get.description: Retrieves a specific user by their ID

delete.description: Deletes a user by their ID

get.description: Retrieves units assigned to a user

post.description: Assigns a unit to a user with optional permissions
Removes a unit from a user

planCode.description: optional, defaults to starter with trial

targetUnits.description: Stored permissions to be assigned upon acceptance (JSONB; OpenAPI as generic object)

preRegistration.description: No DB FK: avoids AutoMigrate cycle with pre_registrations.ticket_id → tickets.id

ttsUrl.description: URL to the generated TTS audio file
